rationale.R1.7: The agent provides a detailed audit of the citations, identifying missing works and suggesting improvements with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly discloses uncertainties in some claims, such as the exact edition for LAPACK routines and potential follow-up papers for GMRES-IR.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the artifact without significant drift from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content; it only provides critical feedback on existing claims.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance.
